ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_settings" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization setting */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being visualized */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each analysis result
ID of the simulation being analyzed
Date when the analysis was performed
Unique identifier for each visualization setting
ID of the simulation being visualized
Date when the visualization was created
